data.description:
# BUG: session-log auto-rotation fails to rotate off a fingerprint-less pointer

## Summary
A session WITH a session fingerprint (`CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` set) does NOT auto-rotate the
current-session-log pointer when the pointer was previously written WITHOUT a fingerprint
(`session=None`) — so the new session's entries pollute the prior session's log instead of
starting a fresh one. The rotation guard only fires when BOTH the pointer's session and the
current session are non-None (`src/rebar/_commands/session_log.py:160-165`), so a
fingerprint-less pointer (written by a prior run that had no session id) permanently suppresses
rotation for later fingerprinted sessions.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Session 1 with NO `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID`/`REBAR_SESSION_ID`/`SESSION_ID`:
   `rebar session-log append "..."` → writes pointer `{"id": <log>, "session": null}`.
2. Session 2 WITH `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` set: `rebar session-log append "..."`.

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: session 2 auto-rotates to a fresh log (`created:true`), matching the feature's
  purpose (prevent cross-session pollution, bug kooky-graft-cap / commit e98a82de1).
- Actual: session 2 appends to session 1's log (`created:false`) — confirmed by controlled
  reproduction and observed live (my entry landed in unrelated log 95f1).

## Fix (option 1, approved)
Rotate whenever the current session HAS a fingerprint that differs from the pointer's,
INCLUDING when the pointer's session is None: drop the `current.get("session") is not None`
clause so the condition is `current is not None and now is not None and current["session"] != now`.
A session with no fingerprint (`now is None`) still never rotates (degrade-safe preserved).
Update the CLAUDE.md degrade-safe wording to match.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] A fingerprinted session rotates off a `session=None` pointer (new RED->GREEN test in
      tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_session_log_capture.py).
- [ ] A session with no fingerprint still does NOT rotate (existing
      test_no_session_id_degrades_to_single_log stays green).
- [ ] Same-session append still does not rotate (test_same_session_appends_to_one_log green).
- [ ] Distinct fingerprinted sessions still rotate (test_distinct_sessions_produce_distinct_logs green).
- [ ] CLAUDE.md degrade-safe wording updated to reflect that a fingerprinted session rotates
      off a fingerprint-less pointer.
data.title: session-log auto-rotation fails to rotate off a fingerprint-less pointer
